# Transcrição: 24-How to Add Assets

- **Fonte:** 24-How to Add Assets
- **Duração:** 01:42
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 01:42]

Alright, so you would have been given access to a essentially a Google Drive link that was shared with you. Now what you need to do is you need to share any assets that you have like videos, images, font files, branding files, anything and everything that you want your marketers to be across. This is important, right? They can only do so much with what they're working with. So the more you give them, the more they have. So what you do is really simple, you just click on you and you're basically, you can upload an entire folder from your desktop. So you can do that. You can also upload individual files. They will automatically have access to it as they've been given access to this folder as well. So just remember, what's really important for you to do is to fill out the form, the briefing form with the add account ID, the pixel ID as well and make sure that you have shared that pixel into the two new add accounts. This is super important guys. The second thing that's really important is that you have added payment information to each of the add accounts. They won't be able to see that because they're only advertisers. And also that you have created a spending limit of $500 on each add account. And the third thing is that you have uploaded all the assets to this folder. Once this is all done, the marketers will pretty much have exactly what they need. They will request access to your page and your add account. And then you need to approve that request and work through it with them to make sure that they have access that they need. And this is how to get started.
